hero.description: Our atelier of beauty specialists and curated luxury products deliver rituals designed exclusively for you — where elegance meets transformation.

items.title: Couture Nail Art
items.description: Elevate your hands with our bespoke nail extensions, crafted using the finest materials and avant-garde techniques by our master nail artists.

items.title: Luminous Skin Ritual
items.description: Restore your skin's natural brilliance through our deeply restorative cleansing, hydration and age-defying treatments — each protocol tailored to your unique skin.

items.title: Permanent Artistry
items.description: Wake up flawless every morning with our precision microblading, ombré brow sculpting and lip contouring. Results that endure 1–3 years.

modal.title: Reserve Your Experience

items.q: How long does laser hair removal take?
items.a: Laser hair removal sessions vary between 15 minutes and 1 hour depending on the treatment area.
Thanks to the anesthetic creams applied before the procedure, the sensation of pain is minimized. Many of our clients find the process quite comfortable.

items.q: Are the products you use authentic?
items.a: Yes, all our products are 100% authentic from world-renowned dermocosmetic and medical aesthetic brands.

items.q: How late can I cancel my appointment?
items.a: You can cancel or reschedule your appointment by calling or sending a WhatsApp message at least 24 hours before your scheduled time.
